send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

Fashion Nova: You made the FN list! Now, tap the link to get 30% OFF the ENTIRE site with code FN115-jjkjqb! -> http://sms.fashionnova.com/avgl4BB8aQpt .

i'm returning my items because they are defective and we're not made correctly. Why am I only getting $406 in store credit and then having to pay an extra five dollars to get the items shipped back???? do I need to file a dispute with my bank instead???

I spent close to $1200, hate majority of the clothes and shoes that I bought in all you guys want to offer me is a store credit and then you're forcing me to pay a five dollars to ship everything back??? absolutely not. I paid way too much money. This is horrible. I don't want the credit. I want my money back because I will never be shopping there again.

Fashion Nova: I'm very sorry to hear this happened, and I understand how disappointing and frustrating that must be! This question will be best handled by visiting http://sms.fashionnova.com/a8eQdMXMIpgY and beginning an inquiry with our team!
it doesn't even let me create an inquiry. How can I get my money back? This is so frustrating.
there's absolutely no way I want $406 in store credit. And I definitely don't want to have to pay five dollars extra to return the merchandise to you for that reason.

Fashion Nova: I'm sorry for the inconvenience! Please submit your inquiry via this link instead: http://sms.fashionnova.com/ajTwGM5uZtcM Please select the option "Something Else" and then select the same option again. I'm so sorry that I can't help with this directly, but my system isn't set up for this type of issue. I recommend reaching out to our customer support team, as they're best equipped to help and will take great care of you!

Who can I speak to about this? This is fucking fraudulent. How are you guys going to try to give me store credit when I paid in cash?? and then you want me to turn around and pay an extra five dollars in cash to return the items is that not fucking fraud???

my items are not as subscribed they're defective and they don't fucking fit. I want my fucking money back. Do I need to dispute the entire fucking charge and when I submitted my request, they got back to me and said that they will issue a gift card. I don't want a fucking gift card. I do not want a gift card. What the fuck is wrong with you guys?? you guys just had a fucking lawsuit for this shit not too long ago and you're still scamming people??

Fashion Nova: I'm sorry for the confusion. If you received damaged, wrong, or incomplete items, please do not send these items through the return portal. Instead, contact Customer Care through our Fashion Nova Help Center: http://sms.fashionnova.com/anGqaw4RGBiW We will verify the issue, send a complimentary label if needed, and refund the item to your original payment method.

conversation.message_text: Brooklyn Bedding: Welcome to Brooklyn Bedding! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/Gcg
Brooklyn Bedding: Congrats! Your offer has been activated and can be redeemed here: https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/ao5m0lTIxtxc
Brooklyn Bedding: PS Don't forget to add us to your phonebook! Stop to stop

Brooklyn Bedding: Hey , better sleep is waiting for you. 😴

Come back and add Sedona Elite to your cart! https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/ayM85li5Ie1D  Stop to stop

Brooklyn Bedding: Need some convincing? See our reviews and redeem your offer now!
See All Reviews: https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/ap8uXxWtQjiA  Stop to stop
Brooklyn Bedding: If you need additional help please email us at support@brooklynbedding.com. Text STOP to opt out.
Brooklyn Bedding: Kick off the school year right with 25% off mattresses, pillows, and more! Shop now: https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/aOaaHzFjkUUW  Stop to stop
Brooklyn Bedding: Upgrade their sleep, upgrade their grades! Save 25% on all mattresses, pillows, and more. Shop now: https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/a-zGf7h1Zlly  Stop to stop

Brooklyn Bedding: Hi again! It’s Sarah, your personalized concierge. Is there anything I can help you with today? 

We just slashed prices, check out our sale on the website: https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/aDPCF7iaXfys  Stop to stop
I'm looking for an RV mattress.
And a decent discount on it too.

Brooklyn Bedding: Thanks for reaching out! Let me know what you think about our best on a budget Dreamfoam Essential - https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/anAbvODsvBWu
 
We also have it available on multiple RV sizes and is currently all on sale! Let me know what you think.
What's the difference in that and the Aurora Luxe?

Brooklyn Bedding: The Dreamfoam provides customizable comfort to find the size that best fits your sleep space. Our dense foams are built to last and focus on comfort. The Aurora specializes in cooling, our top comfort layer is evenly infused with cooling fibers, a clinically proven method that absorbs excess body heat and releases heat back to you as needed. You can find more information on the Aurora Luxe here - https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/arJySw7D4H1L
If I have an air conditioned RV do I need the Aurora Luxe?

Brooklyn Bedding: The cooling-infused foam on the Aurora Luxe actually does more than just remove excess body heat. It helps regulate your body temperature for maximum comfort so the fibres can also release heat back to you as needed. You can totally go for it even if your RV is air-conditioned, the cooling fibres will still work as intended to keep you at the most comfortable temperature! 

I hope this helps!
Is it more supportive since it is thicker?  Or is it softer? Less supportive?
I'm sorry to keep asking g so many questions. The Aurora Luxe is quite a bit more expensive and it is much taller/thicker. I simply can't make up my mind and either is a whole lot of money!

Brooklyn Bedding: No worries at all and I understand! Typically, you should expect that your mattress will take around 30-45 nights to entirely break-in and the same amount of time for your body to adjust to the sensation of a new mattress. During this period of time, your mattress will reach its optimal softness and become fully aerated.

For these reasons, we require a 30 day adjustment period before processing your risk-free return within our generous 120 night trial.
At the rate we came it will take three to four years to get that many nights!  I'm not retired yet so I can't be gone all the time.
Brooklyn Bedding: I totally understand and I appreciate the info. Is there anything else I can help you with?
Thank You. No.
I do have one question, I'd like to see if and how much of a discount you can offer me on the Aurora Luxe if I purchase.

Brooklyn Bedding: You can use the code SCHOOL25 for 25% off. For RV mattresses, you can check out our collection here: https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/aMv2EoDvhG_J

Here's the link for the Aurora Luxe RV mattress: https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/aAFRYUzsAjTN
Can you offer a larger discount?
Brooklyn Bedding: Here's a 30% off code just for you: BBCXJvnmJp - Just follow the link to use it: https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/a7sTqTKGXFHw I hope this helps!
Thanks Very Much!
Brooklyn Bedding: Don't be tardy! ⏰ Our Back-to-School sale ends TONIGHT. Save 25% before it's too late: https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/a7eqisjQVDu5  Stop to stop
The code you gave me for 30% is invalid.
Brooklyn Bedding: I'm sorry to hear that. Can you share with me a screenshot of the error and the items on your cart so I can look into it further? Thank you.
Brooklyn Bedding: I'm sorry, I can't open the image you've sent. Would you mind sending it again?

Brooklyn Bedding: Thank you for trying but I'm afraid the image is still coming in broken. Can you please upload the image(s) here: https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/axVigWguElcU and send me the generated link? Thank you for your patience!
I can't get it to upload. Sorry!  Not very tech savvy!
Brooklyn Bedding: No problem! Please try using the code SCHOOL25 for 25% off at checkout. If you still face issues, you can call us at +1 623-624-1222 for further assistance.

Extra 10% off select AeroTower, Air Purifier, Dehumidifier, Headphones, LG Styler, Vacuum, Wireless Speakers is off the pre-tax sale price on LG.com only. Offer valid for one-time use only within 30 days of code being sent. To receive the additional 10% off savings, promotion code must be entered at online checkout and will be applied to eligible products only. If any of the qualifying items are removed from the cart, canceled or returned, the promotional savings will be void. Availability, prices and terms of offer are subject to change without notice. For service-related issues/scheduled repair service appointments use SRI shortcut

send_to_cs: If escalated do NOT send to CS
escalate: ESC if a cx wants to purchase an out of stock item
ESC if cx want someone from the cs team to call them directly
ESC when a cx asks for a call back
ESC if uncertain about refills or product specific questions
ESC if cx has issues registering
ESC if cx asks for help putting through an order
tone: Close the convo once the client takes over
Don't use too many exclamation points
Use more formal language such as "Hello" instead of "Hey"
Avoid responding to anything related to politics
dos_and_donts: Always use your VPN when accessing their website & make sure you're sending US links
Don't ever release information on personnel related to the company
Don't share any authorized retailers, only boutiques
Don't ask cx to leave product reviews as they don't collect them
drive_to_purchase: When D2P'ing, do not send links of the search results page, send either a related collection or product page
